class.name: GKNotificationBanner
class.brief_description: Shows Apple's Game Center notification banners.
class.description: Utility wrapper for [code skip-lint]GKNotificationBanner[/code] display APIs.

method.name: show
method.description: Shows a banner with [param title] and [param message].

method.name: show_with_duration
method.description: Shows a banner for [param duration] seconds.
